name: Jessica & Krystal
overview: Jessica & Krystal will take viewers behind the scenes to Jung Soo-yeon and Jung Soo-jung's stylish life as sisters and friends. The use of their Korean names implies that the viewers will be seeing a personal side of the two sisters instead of their stage appearance as Jessica & Krystal.

trailers.title: What kind of music do Jessica and Krystal listen to? [Jessica&Krystal]
